message:
feat(truth): implement zone-wide TruthPrecedencePolicy for consistent operator answers [MOR/C2.3]

- Add TruthPrecedencePolicy struct with zone-wide source ordering, minimum acceptable
  threshold, fallback control, and operational model version tag
- Add OperationalModelVersion enum (V1HostFirst, V2MeshNative)
- Add v1_default() (HostBacked first) and v2_default() (MeshBacked first) constructors
- Add for_zone() for zone-specific policy overrides
- Add resolve_with_policy() to LiveTruthResolver — policy-aware resolution path
- Add with_precedence_policy() constructor for policy-constrained resolvers
- 8 acceptance tests (same-zone consistency, policy override, fallback, serde roundtrip,
  v1/v2 defaults, is_acceptable threshold, no-fallback enforcement)
- Fix pre-existing: .raw -> .raw() in fwc main.rs (C3.1 phantom type change)
- Fix pre-existing: spurious impl_fcp_sealed! in new_cmd.rs test
- Fix pre-existing: double #[must_use] on fcp-registry Router-returning fns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
